series_metadata.series_title: Correspondence from and to the National Credit Union Administration
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain any correspondence from and to, or relating to the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for two (2) years from date of correspondence, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for two (2) years from date of correspondence, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
